The highly fake Apple multinational OEM empire template in the original data has been physically shattered. The paid-in capital is a mere 395,200 RMB. In the vast majority of cases, this data combination would be judged as a pure proxy shell company. The picture of the truth instantly reversed and became extremely concrete: this is absolutely not a shell company, but an extremely hardcore 2-Employee Micro SMT Prototyping Workshop at the very bottom of the industry chain. In a small storefront or workshop on Shijing Road in Dongshan Sub-district, the boss, who is likely a technician himself, spent several hundred thousand to buy a second-hand SMT placement machine and reflow soldering oven. They don't do R&D, nor do they produce their own electronic products; instead, they specialize in taking on the dirty, tiring work of 'small-batch circuit board placement prototyping (PCBA processing)' outsourced by surrounding large factories or R&D companies. Although the official 'Electronic Device Manufacturing' broad category points in the right direction, it severely exaggerates its scale.
